title: Setup FastAPI Backend Project
description: Initialize the Python/FastAPI backend project, configure dependencies, and establish a basic project structure (e.g., backend/app/).
ai_instructions: You are a backend developer. Your goal is to create a clean, scalable project structure for a Python FastAPI application.
execution_steps: Create a Python virtual environment inside 'backend/venv'.
Install FastAPI and uvicorn: 'pip install fastapi uvicorn[standard]'.
Create a 'backend/app/main.py' file with a 'hello world' FastAPI application.
Create a 'backend/requirements.txt' file listing the dependencies.
definition_of_done: A Python virtual environment exists at 'backend/venv'.
Dependencies are installed and listed in 'backend/requirements.txt'.
The command 'uvicorn app.main:app --reload' successfully starts the server from within the 'backend' directory.
